title: Soft-tier pending-graduations shard drain complete
body:
Soft-tier pending-graduations shard drain complete under claim
96528b72-ab33-4b6e-8faa-61bb49494951, now closed.

Scope: verified the already-graduated Lockfile-in-flux entry's durable home in
.agent/skills/start-right-quick/shared/start-right.md, archived the full body
to .agent/memory/operational/archive/pending-graduations-archive-2026-05-24.md,
and removed only that processed body from the active legacy shard.

Validation passed: targeted markdownlint, targeted git diff --check, rg
presence/absence check, pnpm practice:fitness:informational exit 0 with
SOFT (20 soft) - informational mode, and pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard
exit 0 with SOFT (20 soft).

No source/tooling lanes touched. Broader consolidation remains active at soft
tier; no hard or critical surfaces are present.
